title: Powell sees tariffs raising inflation and says Fed will wait before further rate moves - CNBC
query: [SOURCES] "Jerome Powell" AND (dovish OR hawkish OR independence)
relevance_reasoning: The article mentions US monetary policy, specifically Fed Chairman Powell's comments on tariffs and inflation, which is relevant to the DXY.
event_reasoning: The article quotes Powell as saying the Fed will wait before further rate moves, indicating a dovish stance on monetary policy. This suggests that the Fed is not planning to raise interest rates in the near future.
impact_reasoning: Powell's dovish guidance on tariffs and rate moves suggests a weakening of the USD, which is inversely correlated with DXY. The EUR has a significant weight in the DXY basket (57%), so any weakness in EUR will lead to strength in DXY. However, the magnitude of this impact is not expected to be as high as a major Fed rate change or crisis, but rather a moderate response to Powell's guidance.
